description: Benchmark-first Spark domain chip for building and evaluating agent memory systems against LongMemEval, LoCoMo, and ConvoMem.

evaluate.description: Score chip readiness across manifest, evidence, evaluation, attribution, and benchmark-target coverage.

packets.description: Build benchmark scorecards, strategy packets, and watchtower summaries.

suggest.description: Propose bounded benchmark-driven mutations from failure classes and target gaps.

watchtower.description: Track benchmark coverage, public-leader targets, and missing research controls.

prompt_hints: Optimize for benchmark truth, not architecture aesthetics.
Treat temporal reasoning and knowledge updates as first-class memory problems.
Do not count a benchmark win until the scoring path is reproducible.
Track open-source borrowing explicitly and preserve license boundaries.
